title: Plan with Claude Opus, Build with Kimi K2.6? LIVE Mixed-Provider Benchmark
summary: Cole Medin benchmarked mixed-provider LLM workflows using Archon to determine the optimal allocation of planning and implementation tasks between Claude Opus and Kimi K2.6. The Dark Factory shipped a working mixed-provider PR using Opus for deep reasoning and Kimi for implementation, but the benchmark matrix tested all four combinations across three real GitHub issues, scoring the results on seven code quality dimensions.
